name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ SelfieStyle turns your selfies into stunning styled images!

Here's how it works:
1. Upload a selfie
2. Pick a style from the menu
3. Choose how many images to generate
4. Download your styled images!

Styles: Love, Fashion, Lifestyle, Culture, Dream, Social Media, Secret, Random.

It's completely free — generate as many as you like.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
